all.en: All employees are required to complete the annual cybersecurity awareness training.
all.zh: 全體員工須完成年度資安意識訓練。

all.en: This training helps protect company data and customer information.
all.zh: 本訓練有助於保護公司資料與客戶資訊安全。

all.en: It is part of our ongoing commitment to information security best practices.
all.zh: 此為本公司持續推動資安最佳實務承諾的一環。

all.en: The course is available on the corporate learning platform starting March 1.
all.zh: 本課程自 3 月 1 日起於企業學習平台上線。

all.en: Employees must complete the training by March 31 at the latest.
all.zh: 員工最遲須於 3 月 31 日前完成訓練。

all.en: The full course takes approximately ninety minutes to complete.
all.zh: 完整課程約需九十分鐘完成。

all.en: It can be done in multiple sessions to fit your work schedule.
all.zh: 可分次進行，方便配合工作時程。

all.en: The training covers phishing emails, password hygiene, and safe browsing.
all.zh: 訓練內容涵蓋釣魚郵件、密碼管理與安全瀏覽。

all.en: It also explains how to handle suspicious links and unexpected attachments.
all.zh: 並說明如何處理可疑連結與非預期附件。

all.en: A new module on remote work security has been added this year.
all.zh: 今年新增遠端工作資安專屬單元。

all.en: Another new module focuses on protecting mobile devices.
all.zh: 另一新單元聚焦於行動裝置防護。

all.en: Short quizzes will appear after each section to reinforce key concepts.
all.zh: 每個單元結束後將安排簡短測驗以強化重點觀念。

all.en: A passing score of eighty percent is required to receive credit.
all.zh: 須達 80 分以上方可取得認證學分。

all.en: Employees may retake quizzes as many times as needed.
all.zh: 員工可視需要多次重複作答測驗。

all.en: Managers will receive a weekly progress report for their teams.
all.zh: 主管將每週收到所屬團隊的進度報告。

all.en: Completion of this training is mandatory for continued system access.
all.zh: 完成本訓練是維持系統使用權限的必要條件。

all.en: Employees who do not complete the training may temporarily lose network access.
all.zh: 未完成訓練者可能暫時失去網路使用權限。

all.en: If you suspect a phishing attempt, please forward the message to phish@company.com.
all.zh: 如懷疑遭遇釣魚攻擊，請將郵件轉寄至 phish@company.com。

all.en: Never share your password with anyone, including IT staff.
all.zh: 請勿將密碼提供給任何人，包括 IT 人員。

all.en: Always lock your computer when stepping away from your desk.
all.zh: 離開座位時務必鎖定您的電腦。

all.en: Use only company-approved software and cloud storage services.
all.zh: 僅可使用公司核准的軟體與雲端儲存服務。

all.en: Report any lost or stolen devices to the help desk immediately.
all.zh: 如遺失或遭竊任何裝置，請立即通報服務窗口。

all.en: Quarterly simulated phishing tests will continue throughout the year.
all.zh: 本年度將持續每季進行釣魚演練。

all.en: Thank you for helping us keep our organization safe and secure.
all.zh: 感謝您共同維護組織的安全與資訊保護。

all.en: Multi-factor authentication will become mandatory for all systems starting next quarter.
all.zh: 多因子認證將自下季起於所有系統強制實施。

all.en: Approved password manager applications can be installed via the software portal.
all.zh: 可透過軟體入口安裝公司核准的密碼管理應用程式。

all.en: Visitors to the office should be escorted at all times and signed in at reception.
all.zh: 辦公室訪客全程須有人陪同，並於接待處完成登記。

all.en: Confidential documents must be stored in locked cabinets or secure digital folders.
all.zh: 機密文件應存放於上鎖櫃或安全的數位資料夾中。

all.en: Public Wi-Fi networks should be avoided when accessing company systems remotely.
all.zh: 遠端存取公司系統時應避免使用公共 Wi-Fi 網路。

all.en: Always verify the sender's identity before responding to urgent payment requests.
all.zh: 回應緊急付款要求前，務必先確認寄件人身分。

all.en: Software updates on company devices should be installed promptly when prompted.
all.zh: 公司裝置出現更新提示時應立即安裝軟體更新。

all.en: Annual security audits will be conducted by both internal and external teams.
all.zh: 每年將由內部與外部團隊共同執行資安稽核。

all.en: Employees who report security incidents promptly may be recognized at quarterly meetings.
all.zh: 及時通報資安事件的員工可能於季會上獲得表揚。

all.en: Together we can build a stronger culture of cybersecurity awareness at every level.
all.zh: 齊心協力可在各層級建立更穩固的資安意識文化。

all.en: Bring your own device users must complete an additional mobile security module this year.
all.zh: 自攜裝置使用者今年須加修一項行動安全進階單元。

all.en: Encrypted file sharing tools are now available through the official software catalog.
all.zh: 加密檔案分享工具現已開放透過官方軟體目錄取得。

all.en: Privileged access requests must be approved by both the manager and security officer.
all.zh: 特權存取申請須經主管與資安長共同核准。

all.en: Suspicious removable storage devices found in the office should never be plugged in.
all.zh: 在辦公室發現的可疑可攜式儲存裝置切勿插入電腦使用。

all.en: Travel security tips will be reviewed in a special session for frequent business travelers.
all.zh: 將另開特別場次為經常出差員工複習差旅資安要點。

all.en: Our incident response hotline is staffed twenty-four hours a day, seven days a week.
all.zh: 資安事件應變專線全年無休、二十四小時待命。

all.en: Backup procedures protect critical business records against ransomware and data loss.
all.zh: 備份程序可保護重要業務紀錄免於勒索軟體及資料遺失。

all.en: Quarterly security newsletters share emerging threats and recommended protective actions.
all.zh: 每季資安電子報將分享最新威脅與建議的防護作為。

all.en: Departmental security champions will be selected to promote best practices in each team.
all.zh: 各部門將選拔資安推手以推廣團隊內的最佳實務。

all.en: We sincerely appreciate every employee's contribution to our shared security mission.
all.zh: 我們由衷感謝每位員工對共同資安使命的貢獻。
